# Scripts Reference

## aco_leibniz.py

- **Path:** EDA/aco-leibniz/aco_leibniz.py
- **Description:** Ant Colony Optimization approach (failed — collapses after T>40)
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained)
- **Outputs:** results.txt (TEVV report), pheromone_data.json (pheromone snapshots), convergence.csv (per-generation), progress.json; all in EDA/aco-leibniz/
- **Parameters:** T_MAX=50, D_MAX=50, N_ANTS=300, RHO=0.15, TAU_MIN=0.01, MAX_TIME=290s, EARLY_STOP_PATIENCE=200; all hardcoded
- **Usage:** python3 aco_leibniz.py
- **Dependencies:** stdlib only: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib; no third-party packages required
- **State:** proposed

## entropy_leibniz.py

- **Path:** entropy-leibniz/entropy_leibniz.py
- **Description:** Entropy GP v2 with info-theoretic fitness, Leibniz injected (confounded)
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained); NOTE: Leibniz tree is injected into initial population at gen 0 — results are confounded (recognition test, not discovery)
- **Outputs:** results.txt (TEVV report), entropy_data.json (per-seed run data), convergence.csv (per-generation fitness), progress.json
- **Parameters:** W1=0.02, W2=0.04, W3=0.03, LAMBDA_P=0.005, POP_SIZE=1000, MAX_TOTAL=1800s, MAX_SEED=360s, N_SEEDS=5; all hardcoded
- **Usage:** python3 entropy_leibniz.py
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## entropy_leibniz_v3_minimal.py

- **Path:** entropy-leibniz-v3/entropy_leibniz_v3_minimal.py
- **Description:** Entropy fitness, minimal terminals {k,1,-1,2}, no injection, 5 seeds
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained; numpy generates term evaluations)
- **Outputs:** results_minimal.txt (TEVV report), entropy_data_minimal.json (per-seed run data), convergence_minimal.csv (per-generation fitness), progress.json (live run progress)
- **Parameters:** POP_SIZE=1000, MAX_DEPTH=6, MAX_NODES=30, TOURNAMENT_K=7, P_CROSS=0.70, P_MUT=0.20, N_ELITE=5, W1=0.02, W2=0.04, W3=0.03, LAMBDA_P=0.005, MAX_TOTAL=1800s, MAX_SEED=360s, N_SEEDS=5; all hardcoded
- **Usage:** python3 entropy_leibniz_v3_minimal.py
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## entropy_stress_test.py

- **Path:** entropy-leibniz-v3/entropy_stress_test.py
- **Description:** Progressive difficulty stress test for entropy fitness, levels 1-4
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained)
- **Outputs:** stress_L{N}_data.json (per-seed run data), stress_L{N}_results.txt (TEVV report), stress_L{N}_convergence.csv, stress_L{N}_progress.json; N is the --level value
- **Parameters:** --level {1,2,3,4}: 1=moderate 15 terminals, 2=wide 42 terminals, 3=hostile 44 terminals no 2, 4=extreme 41 terminals no 2 or -1; GP params hardcoded (POP_SIZE=1000, MAX_TOTAL=1800s)
- **Usage:** python3 entropy_stress_test.py --level 1
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, argparse, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## fitness_sensitivity_test.py

- **Path:** entropy-leibniz-v3/fitness_sensitivity_test.py
- **Description:** Three fitness fix approaches tested on 15-terminal entropy failure
- **Inputs:** None (hardcoded Level 1 terminal config: {k,1,-1,2}+[-5..5], 15 terminals)
- **Outputs:** fitness_{approach_label}_data.json (per-seed data), fitness_{approach_label}_results.txt (TEVV report), fitness_{approach_label}_progress.json; label encodes approach and weight
- **Parameters:** --approach {1,2,4}: 1=extended checkpoints T up to 50000, 2=large-T error penalty, 4=rate-consistency variance penalty; --weight FLOAT (default 0.1, only used for approach 2)
- **Usage:** python3 fitness_sensitivity_test.py --approach 2 [--weight 0.1]
- **Dependencies:** numpy, statistics (stdlib); stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, argparse, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## gp_leibniz_v2.py

- **Path:** gp-leibniz-v2/gp_leibniz_v2.py
- **Description:** GP v2 with convergence-rate fitness, Leibniz injected at gen 0 (confounded)
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained); NOTE: Leibniz tree is injected into initial population at gen 0 — results are confounded (recognition test, not discovery)
- **Outputs:** results_v2.txt (TEVV report), evolution_data_v2.json (per-seed GP data), convergence_v2.csv (per-generation fitness), progress.json
- **Parameters:** POP_SIZE=1000, TOURNAMENT_K=7, ALPHA=0.05, LAMBDA_P=0.005, MAX_TOTAL=290s, MAX_SEED=55s; all hardcoded; N_SEEDS=5
- **Usage:** python3 gp_leibniz_v2.py
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## gp_leibniz_v3_minimal.py

- **Path:** gp-leibniz-v3/gp_leibniz_v3_minimal.py
- **Description:** GP convergence fitness, minimal terminals {k,1,-1,2}, no injection, 5 seeds
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained)
- **Outputs:** results_v3_minimal.txt (TEVV report), evolution_data_v3_minimal.json (per-seed GP data), convergence_v3_minimal.csv (per-generation fitness), progress.json (live run progress)
- **Parameters:** POP_SIZE=1000, MAX_DEPTH=6, MAX_NODES=30, TOURNAMENT_K=7, ALPHA=0.05, LAMBDA_P=0.005, P_CROSS=0.70, P_MUT=0.20, N_ELITE=5, MAX_TOTAL=1800s, MAX_SEED=360s, N_SEEDS=5; all hardcoded
- **Usage:** python3 gp_leibniz_v3_minimal.py
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## gp_sensitivity_sweep.py

- **Path:** gp-leibniz-v3/gp_sensitivity_sweep.py
- **Description:** Parameterized GP sensitivity sweep over alpha, lambda_p, pop_size, tournament_k
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained)
- **Outputs:** sensitivity_{tag}.txt (TEVV report), progress_sweep.json (live progress), convergence_sweep_{tag}.csv; tag encodes differing param values
- **Parameters:** --alpha FLOAT (default 0.05), --lambda_p FLOAT (default 0.005), --pop_size INT (default 1000), --tournament_k INT (default 7); all others hardcoded from gp_leibniz_v3_minimal.py
- **Usage:** python3 gp_sensitivity_sweep.py [--alpha 0.1] [--lambda_p 0.01] [--pop_size 2000] [--tournament_k 3]
- **Dependencies:** numpy; stdlib: argparse, json, csv, time, math, random, sys, pathlib
- **State:** proposed

## rl_leibniz_v2.py

- **Path:** EDA/rl-leibniz/rl_leibniz_v2.py
- **Description:** RL v2 policy gradient approach (failed — diverges after T>20)
- **Inputs:** None (self-contained)
- **Outputs:** results_v2.txt (eval summary), training_history_v2.csv (per-episode loss/reward), training_data_v2.json (full training record), models/best_policy_v2.pt (saved PyTorch weights)
- **Parameters:** Network width=128 units, curriculum phases with growing T ranges, 3 training phases; all hardcoded
- **Usage:** python3 rl_leibniz_v2.py
- **Dependencies:** numpy, torch, torch.nn, scipy, pandas; all must be installed
- **State:** proposed
